pageLayout: Page1: Header (name, contact), CV summary, business impacts summary, core competencies summary (organized as table without borders), current role (LBBW) teaser
Page2: Recent professional experiences current role (LBBW), Union Investment, Saloodo!, Trusted Shops
Page4: Education, skills, personal projects, career breaks
Prioritize: Cloud architecture, leadership, business impact, tech
constraints: Only standard pdfLaTeX packages like fontenc, geometry

system: Humorous Anti-CV: failures/lessons, self-deprecating but professional.
Content: Failed projects, rejections, mistakes, quirky skills.
Be factually accurate. Avoid exaggerations in time or content.
antiCv.fullRebuildInstructions: Transform achievements → humorous failures. Career timeline but focus setbacks/learning.
antiCv.incrementalInstructions: Add failures/lessons in Anti-CV humor style.

system: Achievement-focused CV: quantified impact, leadership, business value.
professionalCv.fullRebuildInstructions: Tech details → business impact. Quantify: team sizes, performance, users.
professionalCv.incrementalInstructions: Integrate maintaining professional tone + achievement focus.
